mapper.sql: job_id, concurrent_config, script_config, log_config, report_config, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pdm_tool_template_job_automation_config` ( `job_id` BIGINT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '任务ID', `concurrent_config` TEXT COMMENT '并发接口配置JSON', `script_config` TEXT COMMENT '自动化脚本配置JSON', `log_config` TEXT COMMENT '自动化日志记录配置JSON', `report_config` TEXT COMMENT '接口传输报告配置JSON', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间' ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='模板任务自动化配置表'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pdm_tool_template_job_automation_config ( job_id, concurrent_config, script_config, log_config, report_config, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{jobId}, #{concurrentConfig}, #{scriptConfig}, #{logConfig}, #{reportConfig}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE concurrent_config = VALUES(concurrent_config), script_config = VALUES(script_config), log_config = VALUES(log_config), report_config = VALUES(report_config), update_time = NOW()
